# Agentic Consciousness

> AI consulting for Australian businesses. Strategy, implementation, automation.

## About

Agentic Consciousness is an AI consulting company founded by Daniel Hall with 21+ years of industry experience. We help businesses understand, implement, and scale AI — from strategy workshops to full automation pipelines.

## Services

- AI Strategy & Workshops: Custom sessions, opportunity mapping, practical roadmaps
- AI Tool Implementation: Deploy ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, custom models into workflows
- Automation & Agents: End-to-end autonomous pipelines for document processing, customer service, scheduling

## Contact

- Website: https://agenticconsciousness.com.au
- Email: ai@agenticconsciousness.com.au
- Location: Australia (nationally available)

## Process

1. Free discovery call
2. AI readiness audit
3. Implementation sprint
4. Optimise and scale
